job_source.format: layout configuration JSON + order sequence CSV
job_source.note: layout JSON and order-sequence CSV normalized into storage-allocation and robot-scheduling jobs

mapping_profile.name: returns / kitting cells
mapping_profile.mapping_quality: plan-specific heuristic: order streams are constrained to fixture zones from this floor-plan backdrop

task_coverage.reason: local Taskset/LocalRuntime run has no deployed HUD taskset_id; rewards/traces are real, but platform task coverage requires hud sync/deployed tasksets

job_source.summary: Imported 304 SOAR order lines across 150 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS+SOAR+ARMBENCH orders), mapped to plan-0 (returns / kitting cells): 176 source zones, 11 stations, 3 route constraints, 4 job families, layout pressure 0.357.

provenance.license: public research dataset; verify upstream license before redistribution

intake.scenario_note: Imported 304 SOAR order lines across 150 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS+SOAR+ARMBENCH orders), mapped to plan-0 (returns / kitting cells): 176 source zones, 11 stations, 3 route constraints, 4 job families, layout pressure 0.357.
intake.scenario: Kitting cells need wave picks, component replenishment, and bench handoffs without starving pack stations.
